headline: ArcelorMittal Partially Exits Vallourec Holding to Support Buybacks
summary: MT unlocked value from its Vallourec stake with a $667M share sale, using proceeds to fund buybacks while retaining a strategic holding.

headline: Hitchhiker Commodities: The Supply Chains Nobody Owns
summary: A hidden set of byproduct materials powers modern life, and their supply depends entirely on decisions made for other industries. Read more here.

headline: Love Stories Unwind
summary: The average S&P 500 stock gained 35% in the year leading up to the index's most recent all-time closing high made last Thursday (5/14).
